heading: Usage
body:
To sort your MongoDB Search results, you must do the following:

- Create a MongoDB Search index on the fields to sort the results by.

  To sort on `boolean`, `date`, `number`, `UUID`, and
  `objectId` fields, use dynamic or static mappings. To sort on
  string fields, you must use [dynamic mappings](static-dynamic-mappings) to index the field as the `token` type.

- Create and run your query with the `sort` option against the fields
  you defined in the index for sorting. To learn more, see
  [sort syntax](sort-syntax-ref).
